name: Illidiance
description:
'''Illidiance''' is an [[industrial metal]] band from [[Taganrog]], [[Russia]]. The band was formed in 2004. They have released four full-length albums: "Insane Mytheries To Demise", "Nexaeon", "Damage Theory", and "The Iconoclast", as well as "Live Album 2021" and "Oceanborn", which have sold over 6000 copies. Illidiance also participated in the Brutal Assault festival compilation in 2006, which sold 6000 copies worldwide.

In addition, the band's compositions were included in four compilations released by European magazines: Illidiance's song "Razor To The Skin" was featured on the FEAR CANDY 72 compilation, released by the English magazine Terrorizer; this compilation was released on CD with a circulation of 30,000 copies, and the song "Infected" was included in a compilation from Delolution Magazine (UK).

As part of their Russian and international tours, Illidiance have repeatedly visited cities throughout almost the entire European part of Russia, and have participated in concerts and festivals in CIS countries and Eastern Europe. Illidiance performed at the Brutal Assault festival in 2006 and 2008.
